hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push' || exit 0; git log --name-only --format='' -1 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^convex/' && echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️  Convex alterado — rode no Codespace:\n  npx convex deploy --typecheck disable"}' || true
hooks.statusMessage: Verificando se backend Convex precisa de deploy…
